meaning: n.<英口> 英国圣公会圣职者名册(为Crockford'sClerical Directory的简称)
examples: Crockford has written two proposals to build mashup-aware elements into browsers.
Alan Crockford, a pub landlord in the village, said there had been warnings but "nobody knew it would get this bad".
